Apply ALL steps together as one logical change. Code contexts: ``` (line 43): 42
I'll start by reading the file to understand the current code.

Now let me reason through each fix: ### Fix 1: Button.variant type change The type changed from `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'` to `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`. The only difference is `'stateful'` was added. The values used in this file are `ButtonVariant.primary` (line 43) and `ButtonVariant.link` (line 57) â€” both still exist in the new type. **No code change needed.** ### Fix 2: EmptyState Family Migration This is the more substantial change. In PF v6: 1. **`EmptyStateIcon` becomes the `icon` prop on `EmptyState`** (child-to-prop migration). The `icon` prop on `EmptyStateIcon` was a render function `() => `. In v6, the `icon` prop on `EmptyState` takes a `ReactNode` directly. 2. **`Title` is replaced by `titleText` prop on `EmptyState`** â€” the `headingLevel` prop moves to `EmptyState` too. 3. **Children of `EmptyState` must be wrapped** in `EmptyStateBody`, `EmptyStateFooter`, or `EmptyStateActions`. Looking at the current code, `EmptyStateBody` and `EmptyStateActions` are already used, so those are fine. 4. In v6, primary actions go in `EmptyStateActions` inside `EmptyStateFooter`, and secondary actions also go in a separate `EmptyStateActions` inside `EmptyStateFooter`. Let me apply the v6 structure: - Remove `EmptyStateIcon` component usage â†’ move to `icon` prop on `EmptyState` - Remove `Title` component usage â†’ move to `titleText` prop on `EmptyState`, `headingLevel` stays on `EmptyState` - Wrap the `EmptyStateActions` groups in `EmptyStateFooter` - Clean up imports: remove `EmptyStateIcon`, `Title`, add `EmptyStateFooter`

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1: `Button.variant` type change
**No change needed.** The type change only adds `'stateful'` to the union. The values used in this file (`ButtonVariant.primary` on line 43 and `ButtonVariant.link` on line 57) both remain valid in the new type. No code modification required.

### Fix 2: EmptyState Family Migration
**Applied.** The following changes were made:

1. **`EmptyStateIcon` â†’ `icon` prop on `EmptyState`**: Removed the `<EmptyStateIcon icon={...} />` child component and moved its `icon` render function value to the `icon` prop directly on `<EmptyState>`.

2. **`Title` â†’ `titleText` prop on `EmptyState`**: Removed the `<Title headingLevel="h4" size="lg">` child component. Moved the heading text to a `titleText` prop on `<EmptyState>`, and moved `headingLevel="h4"` to `<EmptyState>` as well.

3. **Wrapped `EmptyStateActions` in `EmptyStateFooter`**: Both `<EmptyStateActions>` groups are now wrapped inside a single `<EmptyStateFooter>` as required by the v6 composition tree.

4. **Import cleanup**: Removed `EmptyStateIcon` and `Title` from imports (no longer used). Added `EmptyStateFooter` to imports. `EmptyStateBody` and `EmptyStateActions` were already imported and remain.

### Fix 2
Lines: 42, 56
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: EmptyStateActions

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

  (line 56):

   56          <Button
   57            variant={ButtonVariant.link}

```

### Fix 3
Line: 29
Rule [sd-new-absorbing-prop-emptystate-titletext]:
Component <EmptyState> has a new prop `titleText` (type: `React.ReactNode`) added in v6 that accepts JSX content.

This prop may be intended to receive content that was previously passed as children. Review the JSX children of <EmptyState> and determine if any should be moved to the `titleText` prop.

Example migration:
  Before: <EmptyState>{content} other children</EmptyState>
  After:  <EmptyState titleText=>other children</EmptyState>
